data.name: Hacker's Restart
data.detailed_description:
Hacker's Restart is a game about you and your childhood friend starting a new chapter in your lives in order to save your parents from the legal troubles you brought on yourselves.

As the child of a rich family, you have lived a privileged and isolated life. Being protected from the outside world by your parents your entire life, you never had the chance to make a lot of friends. This is the reason why you and your childhood friend Celine started living your lives in front of computer screens.

It all started as a fun little way to mess with Celine, hacking into her computer as a prank and having fun with it. Your fascination by the world of hacking quickly spiraled out of control as you got more engulfed by it, which landed you in a sticky situation with the law. Even though who you are- other than your online name- is not known by the government, this doesn't mean that you are safe where you are.

This is where your story starts. What will you encounter in your new life? Who can you trust? And most importantly, will you be able to outsmart the law?​



Find a way out of your problems with the law

Meet influential people to help get the mafia off your back for good while also clearing your name in the eyes of the law.

Build meaningful relationships

Make the right decisions in order to develop your relationships with the women around you.

Pursue one-night stands

There's no harm in having some extra fun on the side, right?

Hacker's Restart is a completed game, so there's no need to wait for the story to continue or to buy additional DLCs to experience the game in full.
There are planned quality of life and visual quality updates in the near future that are completely free and optional.

data.short_description: Hacker’s Restart is an adult visual novel featuring multiple endings. Move into a new city to escape from your problems with the law, pursue relationships and one-night stands, and find a way to clear your name. And don’t forget: your choices matter.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/ 7+
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU capable of showing images & video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU capable of showing images & video
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU capable of showing images & video
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible
